notes: Full shareable small-plates menu captured (Light Bites, Veggies, Seafood, Meat, Flatbread, Sweets) -> venue_format share-plate, savory items course_type 'plate', sweets 'dessert'. Menu marks GF, DF, NF/SF (nut-free/sesame-free), and V. Recorded GF and (conservatively) V as VEG -> the menu's legend labels V 'Vegan' but at least one V item contains feta, so VEG is the safer claim; DF and NF/SF are outside our tag vocab and omitted. Bacon lemon scallops are market price. Cocktail/wine list on a separate Drinks page, not captured.
